entities.name: CIRINA BUTYROSPERMI
entities.description: The shea caterpillar, an insect valued as a human food item in Burkina Faso.

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: The country where the study on Cirina butyrospermi was conducted.

entities.name: DIAPAUSE
entities.description: A period of suspended development in the nymphal stage of the shea caterpillar.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: External conditions including humidity and temperature used to attempt to break diapause.

entities.name: HORMONAL TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of hormones to prepupae and pupae to break diapause.

entities.name: BOVINE INSULIN
entities.description: A hormone used in the treatment of prepupae and pupae to attempt to break diapause.

entities.name: 20-HYDROXYECDYSONE
entities.description: A hormone used in the treatment of prepupae and pupae to break diapause.

entities.name: EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of the insect emerging from the pupal stage.

entities.name: INCUBATION TIME
entities.description: The duration of time between treatment and the emergence of the insect.

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of the adults emerging from the pupal stage.
